- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Flutter sick leave generator app with Google auth, Firebase, and social sharing features

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Flutter project created successfully

- [x] Customize the Project - Complete Flutter sick leave app with authentication, Firestore, and social sharing implemented

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No specific extensions required for Flutter project

- [x] Compile the Project - Project compiles successfully with only minor deprecation warnings

- [x] Create and Run Task - No custom tasks needed for Flutter project

- [x] Launch the Project - Use 'flutter run' command to launch the app

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md updated with comprehensive project information
